Reading routes

Solar-Term Topic Map

Topics turn the year into readable routes: urban phenology, home-scale seasons, rain and humidity, light and calendar.

Reading route 3 articles

Urban Phenology

Read the solar terms through streets, rivers, balconies, and wind between buildings.

Xiaoshu / Minor HeatMangzhong / Grain in EarLiqiu / Beginning of Autumn
Reading route 3 articles

Home-Scale Seasons

Use windowsills, desks, kitchens, bedding, and closets as seasonal instruments.

Bailu / White DewDongzhi / Winter SolsticeLiqiu / Beginning of Autumn
Reading route 3 articles

Rain and Humidity

Understand wet seasons through repeatable records of rain, dampness, plants, and rooms.

Mangzhong / Grain in EarBailu / White DewXiaoshu / Minor Heat
Reading route 3 articles

Light and Calendar

Understand the terms through sun angle, day length, room shadow, and evening sky.

Dongzhi / Winter SolsticeLiqiu / Beginning of AutumnHanlu / Cold Dew
Seasonal Observatory

Original seasonal field notes, source cards, and city-scale observation guides for a long-term solar-terms site.
